title: RHCSA 10 Lab 35: Root Recovery
description: Practice the root password recovery workflow

tasks: From the console, interrupt boot and enter emergency recovery mode.
Set the root password to cinder9.
Relabel the system if SELinux requires it.
hints: Use rd.break or emergency target practice in a real VM console.
checks: echo 'console-only password recovery workflow is skipped in SSH replay mode'
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: From the console, interrupt boot and enter emergency recovery mode
Set the root password to cinder9
Relabel the system if SELinux requires it
solution_commands: # console task: interrupt GRUB and boot with rd.break
